governance_fixture_admin_editable.description: Vite governance fixture with editable admin persona, settings-agent principal, eng group, and pending banner.

requirements.description: GIVEN editable admin fixture WHEN reviews:write own grant is saved THEN the principal pending marker and one-change banner appear.
requirements.verify: pnpm --filter @gitbutler/e2e run test:e2e:governance-fixture --grep "principal and group changes"

would_fail_if: direct state mutation bypasses UI flow

requirements.description: GIVEN inherited grant in the principal editor WHEN own grant is staged THEN inherited grant remains read-only.
requirements.verify: pnpm --filter @gitbutler/e2e run test:e2e:governance-fixture --grep "principal and group changes"

requirements.description: GIVEN principal change is pending WHEN eng group receives reviews:write THEN group pending marker and two-change banner appear.
requirements.verify: pnpm --filter @gitbutler/e2e run test:e2e:governance-fixture --grep "principal and group changes"

requirements.description: Principal own-grant edit produces a pending marker and commit banner.
requirements.verify: pnpm --filter @gitbutler/e2e run test:e2e:governance-fixture --grep "principal and group changes"

requirements.description: Inherited grant remains read-only while own grant is staged.
requirements.verify: pnpm --filter @gitbutler/e2e run test:e2e:governance-fixture --grep "principal and group changes"

requirements.description: Group grant edit increments the shared pending banner and marks the group pending.
requirements.verify: pnpm --filter @gitbutler/e2e run test:e2e:governance-fixture --grep "principal and group changes"
